notif.title: Notifications
notif.commentedOnThread: commented on a thread you joined

terms.agreeIntro: By signing up, I agree to the
terms.agreeOutro: and accept full responsibility for my own content.
terms.mustAccept: You must accept the terms to continue.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Score account to continue
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join the community and share your experiences
auth.userNotFound: No account found with that username
auth.usernameAutoHint: Leave blank to use the part of your email before @.
auth.checkEmailDesc: Click the verification link in your email to confirm your account.
auth.verifyEmailToPost: Verify your email to post entries or comments.
auth.emailTakenDesc: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.

verify.bannerDesc: Click the link below to be able to post entries or comments.
verify.requiredDesc: You need to click the verification link at the top to post entries or comments.
verify.okDesc: You can now post entries and comments.
verify.failDesc: The link is invalid or has expired.

ticker.motto: Is this profile real? Is this number a scam? Check before you trust!
ticker.mottoLine2: Sign up in one click, rate and comment!

table.emptySearchTitle: No entries or experiences yet about "{{query}}"
table.emptySearchDesc: Be the first to share an experience about this account, number or user — warn the community and become a reference for digital trust.
table.emptySearchCtaAnon: Sign up and share the first experience
table.signupPromptTitle: You need to sign up first
table.signupPromptDesc: To share the first experience about "{{query}}" you need a Score account. Sign up quickly, come right back and post.
table.notFoundPromptDesc: No experience was found about the person you searched. Would you like to share the first experience?

entry.addDesc: Share your experience. Format will be checked before posting.
entry.ratingExplain: Your score directly shapes this target's community trust score. Low = warning, high = trust. Rate carefully and honestly.
entry.descPlaceholder: Describe your experience in detail (min 10 characters)...
entry.aboutHelp: Enter a short summary between 5 and 30 characters.
entry.confirmDesc: You're about to open a new entry with the details below. Looks right?
entry.pasteDetectedUrl: Extracted username from URL and switched category to {{category}}.
entry.pasteWarnEmail: Email addresses are not supported. Please enter a social handle, phone number, or Score user.
entry.pasteWarnPhone: This looks like a phone number. Would you like to switch to the Phone category?
entry.pasteWarnUnknownUrl: This URL is not from a supported platform.
entry.checkFields: Please check the fields and try again.
entry.duplicateTitle: An entry already exists for this target
entry.duplicateDesc: You can't open multiple entries for the same target. Add your experience to the existing entry instead.
entry.scoreUserMissingDesc: To open an entry under the Score category, the target user must be a registered Score account.
entry.avgRatingTitle: Average of scores given by commenters
entry.verifiedDesc: You can now respond as the target of this entry.
entry.noComments: No experiences yet. Be the first to share.
entry.confirmRatingTitle: You are giving {{rating}}/10 to this user
entry.confirmRatingDesc: Your score will be visible to the community and may be hard to undo. Confirm submission?
entry.limitReached: You can post at most 2 experiences on this entry.
entry.mediaHelp: JPG/PNG/WEBP — up to 10 files, each below 5MB
entry.mediaTooMany: You can upload up to 10 files.
entry.mediaTooBig: Each file must be smaller than 5MB.
entry.replyOnlyTarget: Only the verified target can reply
entry.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number

profile.linkDescription: Verify your Instagram, X or TikTok account to officially respond to entries about you and show a verified badge on your profile.
profile.instructions: Add the code below to your {{platform}} bio, save it, then press "Verify now". You can remove the code from your bio once verified.
profile.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this link?

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.desc: Update your profile info. Avatar is optional.

privacy.title: Privacy — Visibility
privacy.desc: By default, other users only see your username and score. Toggle on the details you want to share.

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
actions.confirmDeleteDesc: This will hide the experience. Contact an admin to restore.

moderation.removed: This content was removed by a moderator.
moderation.removedByOwner: This content was deleted by its author.

messages.title: Messages
messages.noMessages: No messages yet. Send the first one.

onboarding.chooseUsernameDesc: Pick a unique username that will represent you on Score. You won't be able to change it later.

update.title: New version available
update.description: Refresh to get the latest updates.
